title: atriplex prostrata subsp. triangularis
intro: Atriplex prostrata subsp. triangularis, also known as Triangular Orache, is a subspecies of the Atriplex prostrata plant, a type of succulent shrub that belongs to the amaranth family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Triangular Orache include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Triangular Orache can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
